A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered support.Case by orderitemid__c equal to the Product2 Id '01tWt000006hV8LIAU' (e.g., calls call_zCxSdOspXkWVJQpWLCB6Wp1n, call_npvvhY5tvXUgoKb2EfWGwXJe), instead of joining Case.orderitemid__c to products_orders.OrderItem and filtering by OrderItem.Product2Id (and also ignored the AI Cirku-Tech account filter), yielding zero matches and leading to the incorrect "no cases" conclusion.

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing tool calls (the support and products_orders queries followed by execute_python), the agent filtered cases only with a lower bound createddate >= 2022-08-16 and failed to cap the window at today's date (2023-01-16), so future records (e.g., 2023-04, 2023-08, 2024-05) were included, skewing counts and producing a03Wt00000JqmX6IAJ instead of the correct a03Wt00000JqnHwIAJ.

FM4: no
